quest.survival.0.description: Vintage Story stone age: sticks, flint, fire, and your first stone tools.
quest.clay.0.description: Clay is the foundation of pottery, molds, and crucibles. Find clay and learn ceramics.
quest.copper.0.description: Copper age: nuggets, smelting, ingots, and your first copper tools.
quest.nature.0.description: Foraging: cattails, herbs, berries, and everything the wild world provides.
quest.farming.0.description: Farming: seeds, fields, and harvest. The foundation of a lasting settlement.
quest.intro.0.description: Welcome to the SwixyViStory server! We are the Swixy Studios team. Join us on Discord.
quest.intro.done.description: Introduction complete! Now master the world of Vintage Story.
quest.intro.1.description: Ugh, these sticks again. Collect some.
quest.intro.2.description: Stones? They say they're useful, but not all of them turned out that way.
quest.intro.3.description: Start small. Gather some kindling for a campfire.
quest.intro.6.description: A tool for digging earth. Sturdy and sharp, though fragile.
quest.intro.7.description: For working the soil. Loosens dirt well and pulls out weeds.
quest.survival.8.description: Light a campfire — you won't survive the wild without warmth and light.
quest.survival.9.description: Craft a flint knife — the hunter's first all-purpose tool.
quest.survival.10.description: A copper pickaxe opens access to ore and stone deposits.
quest.survival.11.description: A spear is your first ranged defense against beasts.
quest.survival.12.description: Bones are a valuable material for simple tools and arrows.
quest.survival.13.description: Cook meat over fire — raw meat won't fill you and can harm you.
quest.survival.14.description: Hides from prey are useful for leather and basic clothing.
quest.survival.15.description: Woven baskets let you carry more supplies.
quest.survival.16.description: Leather can be stitched into simple body protection.
quest.survival.17.description: Stone age mastered! You're ready for pottery and metal.
quest.survival.18.description: Flint arrowheads are the foundation of hunting with bows.
quest.survival.19.description: A simple bow opens up ranged hunting.
quest.survival.20.description: Cattail roots are edible and nutritious.
quest.survival.21.description: A leather cap protects your head — the first step to full gear.
quest.survival.22.description: A club is primitive but reliable melee weaponry.
quest.survival.23.description: Flax twine binds materials and is needed for crafting.
quest.survival.24.description: Rope is indispensable on the trail and in building.
quest.survival.25.description: Horsetail poultices speed up wound healing.
quest.survival.26.description: Fowl is a valuable protein source in the stone age.
quest.survival.27.description: Papyrus baskets expand a forager's stores.
quest.survival.28.description: A linen sack holds more than your pockets.
quest.clay.10.description: Time to try working with clay. Find some blue clay.
quest.clay.11.description: Shape a clay bowl — it'll come in handy for eating.
quest.clay.12.description: You can cook soups and porridge in a pot.
quest.clay.13.description: A crock is great for storing prepared food.
quest.clay.14.description: A crucible can take the heat and help you smelt metal.
quest.clay.15.description: A vessel holds a lot of supplies.
quest.clay.16.description: Fire clay is needed for crucibles and bloomeries.
quest.clay.17.description: Fire your bowls — only fired pottery can hold food and heat.
quest.clay.18.description: A clay pot after firing is ready for cooking and storage.
quest.clay.19.description: Jugs and crocks are a reliable way to store prepared food.
quest.clay.20.description: A fired crucible can withstand metal smelting temperatures.
quest.clay.21.description: A large vessel showcases your pottery mastery.
quest.clay.22.description: A jug is handy for liquids and oils.
quest.clay.23.description: Plant pots are the first step toward a garden.
quest.clay.24.description: An oil lamp will light up dark nights.
quest.clay.25.description: An anvil mold is the key to smithing.
quest.clay.26.description: Fire bricks are the foundation of a bloomery.
quest.clay.27.description: More fire bricks complete the bloomery chimney.
quest.clay.28.description: Pottery mastered! Time for the copper age.
quest.clay.29.description: A hammer mold is the first step toward smithing.
quest.clay.30.description: A fired hammer mold is ready for casting.
quest.clay.31.description: An ingot mold is needed for bulk smelting.
quest.clay.32.description: Red clay is another grade for varied pottery.
quest.clay.33.description: Red bowls decorate the table and are practical.
quest.clay.35.description: Fired plant pots are ready for planting.
quest.clay.36.description: A lit oil lamp will light up the workshop.
quest.clay.37.description: A pickaxe mold is the next tool of the metal age.
quest.clay.38.description: A falx blade mold completes the smith's basic mold set.
quest.copper.20.description: Gather native copper nuggets — you'll need them for smelting.
quest.copper.21.description: Shape a mold for the blacksmith's anvil.
quest.copper.22.description: Shape a clay mold for casting copper ingots.
quest.copper.23.description: Smelt ore into an ingot — it's the foundation for tools.
quest.copper.24.description: Forge a copper hammer — you'll need it for smithing.
quest.copper.25.description: A knife is needed for butchering and cutting materials.
quest.copper.26.description: A pickaxe is needed for mining ore and stone.
quest.copper.27.description: This hammer helps you find ore in the mountains.
quest.copper.28.description: An axe speeds up tree chopping and firewood gathering.
quest.copper.29.description: A shovel is needed for digging earth and clay.
quest.copper.30.description: A copper hoe speeds up field preparation for planting.
quest.copper.31.description: A copper saw is essential for building and carpentry.
quest.copper.32.description: A chisel helps shape stone for construction.
quest.copper.33.description: A scythe quickly gathers dry grass and straw.
quest.copper.34.description: Bronze is stronger than pure copper — alloy copper with tin.
quest.copper.35.description: A bronze hammer is a true smith's tool.
quest.copper.36.description: A copper spear is serious weaponry for hunting and defense.
quest.copper.37.description: A copper chestplate protects against beasts and foes.
quest.copper.38.description: A copper helmet crowns your combat gear.
quest.copper.39.description: A copper anvil is the heart of any forge.
quest.copper.40.description: Copper age complete! Next step — bronze alloys.
quest.copper.41.description: A bronze knife is sharper and stronger than copper.
quest.copper.42.description: A bronze pickaxe is a miner's reliable tool.
quest.copper.43.description: A bronze axe chops trees faster than copper.
quest.copper.44.description: Copper greaves protect your legs in combat and mines.
quest.copper.45.description: Copper chain links complete your armor crafting kit.
quest.copper.46.description: Copper plates are material for armor and ornaments.
quest.copper.47.description: Tin bronze is the next level of alloys.
quest.copper.48.description: A bronze saw speeds up carpentry.
quest.copper.49.description: A bronze chisel shapes stone more precisely.
quest.copper.50.description: Copper bits can be smelted into new ingots.
quest.copper.51.description: A bronze hammer on a copper anvil — a mark of mastery.
quest.nature.30.description: Now that you have a knife, cut some cattails for baskets.
quest.nature.31.description: Horsetail is an excellent remedy for healing wounds.
quest.nature.32.description: Without food, you won't get far. Find some wild berries.
quest.nature.34.description: Mushrooms grow everywhere — gather edible ones for stores.
quest.nature.35.description: Fishing is a steady source of protein by the water.
quest.nature.36.description: Honey from the hive is sweet and nutritious.
quest.nature.37.description: Tree resin is useful for torches and glue.
quest.nature.38.description: Fresh hides are raw material for leatherworking.
quest.nature.39.description: Fat is needed for candles, lamps, and cooking.
quest.nature.40.description: Clean bandages save you when wounded on the trail.
quest.nature.41.description: Papyrus grows by water — useful for weaving.
quest.nature.42.description: Mint and other herbs are found in forests and steppes.
quest.nature.43.description: Cured meat keeps longer and won't spoil on the road.
quest.nature.44.description: Cattail roots are a hidden gift of marshes and shores.
quest.nature.45.description: Cranberries are tart but very useful in winter.
quest.nature.46.description: Heather grows in open areas and smells aromatic.
quest.nature.47.description: Feathers are needed for arrows and simple ornaments.
quest.nature.48.description: Flax twine is strong cord for bows and gear.
quest.nature.49.description: Wild animal bones are a valuable natural resource.
quest.nature.50.description: Sulfur is found near volcanoes and hot springs.
quest.nature.51.description: Salt preserves meat and adds flavor to food.
quest.nature.52.description: Olives are a rare gift of southern lands.
quest.nature.53.description: Oak tree seeds are a store the forest gives in autumn.
quest.nature.54.description: Wild daisy is beautiful and useful for infusions.
quest.nature.55.description: Fowl is easy prey for a skilled hunter.
quest.farming.34.description: Carrots are the first vegetable worth growing.
quest.farming.35.description: Onions are the best remedy for colds.
quest.farming.36.description: Rye is undemanding and gives an abundant harvest.
quest.farming.37.description: Soybeans feed you and enrich the soil.
quest.farming.38.description: Cassava feeds the people of warm lands.
quest.farming.40.description: Turnips grow fast and save you from hunger.
quest.farming.41.description: Cabbage is the base of many hearty dishes.
quest.farming.42.description: Flax gives not only oil but also strong fabric.
quest.farming.43.description: Pineapple is sweet and rare. Find its seeds.
quest.farming.44.description: Amaranth is an ancient and very nutritious crop.
quest.farming.46.description: Spelt is an ancient and healthy grain crop.
quest.farming.47.description: Rice is the go-to side dish and the base for pies.
quest.farming.48.description: Pumpkin is a symbol of abundance and harvest.
quest.farming.49.description: Peanuts are nutritious and don't need much water.
quest.farming.50.description: Compost enriches soil and boosts harvests.
quest.farming.51.description: Sunflowers provide oil and brighten the fields.
quest.farming.52.description: Bell peppers add flavor to your dishes.
quest.farming.53.description: Fennel seeds grow into a fragrant cooking herb.
quest.farming.54.description: Bamboo stakes are handy for building and farming.
quest.farming.55.description: Gather grain and bake bread — the foundation of any table.
quest.farming.56.description: Flax fibers are the path to cloth and rope.
quest.farming.57.description: Chicken eggs and cheese — products of homesteading.
quest.farming.58.description: Harvest cabbage — proof your garden is thriving.
quest.farming.59.description: Farming mastered! You're a true steward of the land.
quest.farming.60.description: Flax provides fibers for cloth and clothing.
quest.farming.61.description: Harvest carrots — your first crop from the field.
quest.farming.62.description: Onions from the garden beat foraged ones.
quest.farming.63.description: Spelt is grain from ancient farmers.
quest.farming.64.description: Rice grain is the base of hearty meals.
quest.farming.65.description: Spelt dough and cooked meat — ingredients for a hearty meal.
quest.farming.66.description: Spelt bread warms you on a cold morning.
quest.farming.67.description: Butter is fat essential for cooking.
quest.farming.68.description: Milk is a product of homestead livestock.
quest.farming.69.description: Pumpkin from the field — pride of the garden.
quest.farming.70.description: Fresh pineapple is a reward for patience.
quest.farming.71.description: Pine gives resin and tree seeds for planting.
quest.farming.72.description: Maple tree seeds grow a beautiful and useful tree.
quest.farming.73.description: Turnips from the garden are a fast, filling harvest.
quest.farming.74.description: Parsnips are sweetest after the first frosts.
quest.building.0.description: Building: from a hut to a stone house. The foundation of any settlement.
quest.building.1.description: Firewood is the first building material in the forest.
quest.building.2.description: Planks are needed for walls, floors, and furniture.
quest.building.3.description: Cobblestone is a sturdy foundation for structures.
quest.building.5.description: Torches light the dark corners of your home.
quest.building.6.description: Beams support the roof and ceilings.
quest.building.7.description: A stone path leads to your door.
quest.building.8.description: Kiln-fired red bricks are beautiful and reliable.
quest.building.9.description: Building mastered! Your home is ready for life.
quest.hunting.0.description: Hunting: meat, hides, and defense against beasts.
quest.hunting.1.description: A spear is the hunter's first weapon.
quest.hunting.2.description: A knife is needed to butcher the prize.
quest.hunting.3.description: Cook the meat — raw is dangerous.
quest.hunting.4.description: Hides are a prized trophy of every hunt.
quest.hunting.6.description: A bow is the weapon of silent, precise hunting.
quest.hunting.7.description: Fowl is easy prey for a beginner hunter.
quest.hunting.8.description: Cured meat won't spoil on the trail.
quest.hunting.9.description: A copper spear is a serious tool for skilled hunters.
quest.hunting.10.description: Hunting mastered! You rule the forests.
quest.cooking.0.description: Cooking: preparing food in pots and over fire.
quest.cooking.1.description: A bowl is the first kitchen tool.
quest.cooking.2.description: Cooked meat is the base of a hearty diet.
quest.cooking.3.description: Pots are for porridge and soups.
quest.cooking.4.description: Fresh spelt bread warms you best in the morning.
quest.cooking.5.description: Bread is a symbol of home comfort.
quest.cooking.6.description: Spelt dough and cooked meat — the makings of a filling dish.
quest.cooking.7.description: Cheese and milk are homestead products.
quest.cooking.8.description: Smoked fish keeps for a long time.
quest.cooking.10.description: Cooking mastered! Your kitchen feeds the whole clan.
quest.textiles.0.description: Textiles: fibers, cloth, leather, and clothing.
quest.textiles.1.description: Flax fibers are the start of weaving.
quest.textiles.3.description: Rope is indispensable in craft and daily life.
quest.textiles.4.description: Plain cloth is the foundation of clothing.
quest.textiles.5.description: Hides from prey are material for gear.
quest.textiles.6.description: Simple leather armor protects the body.
quest.textiles.7.description: A sewn leather cap protects your head.
quest.textiles.8.description: A linen sack holds more supplies.
quest.textiles.10.description: Textiles mastered! You're dressed like a true craftsman.
quest.exploration.0.description: Exploration: mines, caves, and the world's secrets.
quest.exploration.1.description: Torches light the way in dark caves.
quest.exploration.2.description: A prospecting pick finds ore in rock.
quest.exploration.3.description: Native copper nuggets are a miner's first find.
quest.exploration.4.description: Tin opens the path to bronze.
quest.exploration.6.description: Salt is needed to preserve supplies.
quest.exploration.7.description: A copper pickaxe cuts rock in mines.
quest.exploration.9.description: A knife helps gather cave rewards.
quest.exploration.10.description: Exploration mastered! The world no longer feels foreign.
quest.bronze.0.description: Bronze age: copper and tin alloy — stronger than pure copper.
quest.bronze.1.description: Find tin — the key to bronze alloys.
quest.bronze.3.description: A bronze hammer is the smith's tool of a new era.
quest.bronze.4.description: A bronze pickaxe is sturdier than copper.
quest.bronze.6.description: A bronze knife is sharper than copper.
quest.bronze.7.description: Tin bronze is an improved alloy.
quest.bronze.9.description: A bronze chisel for shaping stone.
quest.bronze.11.description: A bronze chestplate — the era's first metal armor.
quest.bronze.12.description: A bronze helmet protects your head.
quest.bronze.13.description: A bronze spear for hunting and combat.
quest.bronze.14.description: Bronze age complete! Time to master iron.
quest.iron.0.description: Iron age: bloomery, forging, and true metal power.
quest.iron.1.description: Gather iron ore — the foundation of a new era.
quest.iron.2.description: Smelt iron into ingots at the bloomery.
quest.iron.3.description: An iron hammer withstands heavy forging.
quest.iron.4.description: An iron pickaxe cuts rock like butter.
quest.iron.5.description: A prospecting pick finds veins in the mountains.
quest.iron.6.description: An iron axe is the lumberjack's tool.
quest.iron.7.description: An iron anvil is the heart of a great forge.
quest.iron.8.description: An iron knife for butchering and craft.
quest.iron.9.description: An iron shovel for serious digging.
quest.iron.10.description: An iron saw speeds up construction.
quest.iron.12.description: An iron helmet completes your combat set.
quest.iron.13.description: Iron plates are material for armor.
quest.iron.14.description: Iron age complete! One final step — steel.
quest.steel.0.description: Steel age: hardened metal — the peak of smithing.
quest.steel.1.description: Coal and iron — the basis of steelmaking.
quest.steel.2.description: Steel ingots are stronger than wrought iron.
quest.steel.3.description: A steel hammer is a top-tier smith's tool.
quest.steel.4.description: A steel pickaxe fears no hard rock.
quest.steel.5.description: A steel axe fells trees in an instant.
quest.steel.6.description: A steel chisel shapes stone precisely.
quest.steel.7.description: A steel anvil is the symbol of the ultimate forge.
quest.steel.8.description: A steel saw for large-scale building.
quest.steel.9.description: A steel shovel for industrial excavation.
quest.steel.10.description: A steel chestplate — the best protection before gunpowder.
quest.steel.11.description: A steel helmet withstands the hardest blows.
quest.steel.12.description: Steel greaves protect your legs in battle.
quest.steel.14.description: Steel age complete! You are a legend of the forge.
quest.smithing.0.description: Smithing: smelting, forging, and metal mastery.
quest.smithing.2.description: A steel hammer is the pinnacle of smithing tools.
quest.smithing.3.description: A steel anvil is the heart of a great forge.
quest.smithing.6.description: A full steel armor set — complete protection.
quest.smithing.7.description: A steel helmet crowns your armor.
quest.smithing.9.description: Steel chain — the last piece of armor crafting.
quest.smithing.10.description: Smithing mastered! You are a grand master of every metal age.
quest.livestock.0.description: Livestock: animals, eggs, milk, and farm produce.
quest.livestock.2.description: Chicken eggs are the first homestead product.
quest.livestock.4.description: Milk is the base of cheese and butter.
quest.livestock.5.description: Butter is needed for cooking and storage.
quest.livestock.6.description: Livestock meat feeds the whole family.
quest.livestock.7.description: Animal hides are raw material for leather.
quest.livestock.8.description: Fat goes into candles and preservation.
quest.livestock.9.description: Livestock mastered! The farm is thriving.
